name: UK Statutory Interest on Late Commercial Payments

metadata.authority: Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998
metadata.basis: BoE base rate on reference date + 8pp

annual_rate.notes: Derived: UK statutory interest on late commercial (B2B) debts = the Bank of England base rate in force on the reference date (2026-06-30: 3.75%) + 8 percentage points, fixed for this six-month period under the Late Payment of Commercial Debts (Interest) Act 1998. Reference, not legal advice.
